Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}I've decided to go to a four-year college. I think it's true that you need a good education in life.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}But that doesn't mean I've given up![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 312}I'll get into the fashion industry, even if I have to take a part-time job or something like that![n]{f 1 1}
